3168690.name: Toony's Daycare
3168690.description:
The Children have disappeared in a once-beloved daycare, now abandoned and rotting with secrets.

Toony’s Daycare is a first-person 3D platformer with puzzle-solving, exploration, and light horror elements. You play as a determined detective searching for missing children, all of whom were last seen at a seemingly innocent daycare run by the mysterious and eccentric “Dr. Toony.” But beneath the cheerful paint and colorful playgrounds lies something far more sinister — twisted creations, mad scientists, and mind-bending puzzles that challenge your mind and your courage.

As you navigate this mysterious location, you’ll uncover hidden truths, face monstrous horrors, and push deeper into Toony’s delusions. Platform your way through surreal environments, solve intricate puzzles, and survive encounters with creatures made from corrupted imagination.

Key Features

  • Environmental Puzzles: Solve mind-bending puzzles embedded into the environment.

  • Story-Driven Exploration: Discover clues, notes, and eerie video logs to uncover what happened to the missing children — and why Toony wants to keep them.

  • Face Nightmarish Creations: Battle or evade bizarre monsters brought to life by Toony’s warped imagination.

  • A Twisted Playground: Bright and colorful visuals clash with eerie atmosphere to create a uniquely unsettling world where nothing is as it seems.

Will you bring the children home… or become another lost soul in Toony’s machinations?
3168690.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
